title: US fighter jet shoots down UFO over Lake Huron in newly-declassified footage
description: Footage of a US fighter jet shooting down an “unidentified anomalous phenomena” (UAP) over Lake Huron in February 2023.

title: UFO Files: Fresh Declassified Videos Show Strange Objects Caught On Military Cameras
description: The mystery surrounding America’s skies is exploding again after the U.S. Department of Defense released a fresh batch of unclassified UFO footage showing unidentified aerial objects moving at shocking speeds through the sky. The newly released military videos capture strange objects darting in and out of frame, performing unusual maneuvers, and appearing to evade military tracking systems. While the Pentagon continues referring to the sightings as “unidentified aerial phenomena,” online speculation has gone into overdrive, with many viewers convinced the footage could point to something far more mysterious.

title: Pentagon releases fresh UFO files, videos and witness accounts in UAP disclosure
description: The latest disclosure includes 51 videos, multiple documents and audio recordings, taking the total number of publicly released UAP-related files to more than 200.

title: Fighter jet ‘shoots down UFO’ in newly declassified Pentagon video
description: The US Department of War released another tranche of secretive files and videos.

title: Everything you need to know about the release of unsealed UFO files
